title: Fix pagination skipping the first page of results
description:
# Issue #31 - Pagination returns the wrong items

Users report that the first page of /api/items never shows the first products, and the reported total_pages is wrong (the last partial page is missing).

Example: GET /api/items?page=1&page_size=10 should return items 1-10, but it returns items 11-19.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- page is 1-based: page=1 returns the first page_size items
- the last page returns the remaining items
- total_pages rounds UP (25 items / 10 per page = 3 pages)
optimal_hint: The fix is start = (page - 1) * page_size, end = start + page_size, and total_pages = math.ceil(total / page_size). Watch for students who fix the slice but leave integer division for total_pages.
